div.head: 103. Memorandum From the Special Assistant to the President’s Assistant for National Security Affairs (Inderfurth) to the President’s Assistant for National Security Affairs (Brzezinski)Source: National Security Council, Carter Administration Intelligence Files, Box I–025, Egypt 3 Feb. 1977–16 Aug. 1979. Secret.
div.p: We received the attached CIA proposalAttached but not printed. on Monday.October 23. It was staffed to Henze who has distributed it to SCC principals. Stan Turner may want to discuss this on Wednesday,October 25. hence I am providing it to you for your information.

I suggest, by the way, that if this assistance is to be provided, it should be done quickly. Months of delay, [less than 1 line not declassified] could prove harmful. [2½ lines not declassified] My hunch is that there isn’t, but we should explore this.
